meaning: n.纽约早期荷兰移民的后代,纽约市人
examples: Someeventually claimed that they were related to Father Knickerbocker!
In fact, ex-New Yorker Dee Dee Bridgewater used to go to hear Brackeen at The Knickerbocker in Greenwich Village just for the solos.
Dubai World still owns properties in New York, including 450 Lexington Avenue, The W Hotel Union Square, The Mandarin Oriental Hotel and the Knickerbocker on Times Square.
